anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The accepted standard declares this exact refine-instance skill id, and the organ atlas row provides a resolved public benchmark-integrity mechanism with trace recomputation, source-module manifests, negative cases, and receipt evidence.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: The accepted standard declares this exact refine-instance skill id, and the organ atlas row provides a resolved public benchmark-integrity mechanism with trace recomputation, source-module manifests, negative cases, and receipt evidence.

statement: Microcosm Agent Benchmark Integrity Anti Gaming Replay Refine Instance
title: Microcosm Agent Benchmark Integrity Anti Gaming Replay Refine Instance
triggers: A benchmark-integrity replay instance has stale or weak source refs, receipts, trace recomputation evidence, negative cases, or claim-ceiling language.
The correction can be bounded to public fixture evidence and source-module manifests without claiming benchmark scores or provider execution.
workflow: Inspect the standard, organ atlas row, runtime source locus, fixture bundle, source-module manifest, mechanism evidence, receipts, generated health, and prior anti-claims before mutation.
Change only fields that tighten source refs, fixture refs, validator binding, receipt expectations, negative-case coverage, authority ceiling, or anti-claim wording.
Regenerate projections and preserve unresolved benchmark-score, capability, provider, release, private-equivalence, and whole-system claims as residual pressure.
